paragraphs: Hi, I am Avi Dewan — a Software Engineer at Therap BD Ltd and a Computer Science graduate from BUET (Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology). I am passionate about building robust, scalable software systems.

I have a strong foundation in programming languages like Java, JavaScript, C, C++, and Python, and currently work primarily within the Spring ecosystem (Spring Boot, Spring MVC). I am proficient in both frontend and backend development, with hands-on experience in system design, containerization, and CI/CD pipelines.

My current interests lie in software architecture, system design, backend engineering, and AI-assisted development. I enjoy thinking about how systems scale, how services communicate, and how to write software that is both maintainable and performant.

As a person, I always try to be accountable. I strive to follow routines, uphold commitments, and live with discipline and integrity. I am keen on applying my technical skills and problem-solving abilities to real-world challenges and contributing to innovative projects.

Apart from all the tech stuff, I love travelling and trekking. Growing up in the Chittagong Hill Tracts, hiking and spending time in nature is my absolute favorite thing — my highest altitude so far is 15,289 ft (4,660 m) at Khopra Danda, Nepal. I also enjoy reading novels, watching anime, and immersing myself in the world of gaming in my free time.
